statement: In every magma, Equation 1775 (`x = (y * z) * ((y * x) * w)`) implies Equation 1961 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * (x * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0035
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op y x) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) (op x w))
